notes: Australian water-loss inspection under UV. Controlled low-light, moody but professional and clean — never spooky, horror or forensic-crime toned. Technician wears UV-protective eyewear. Fluorescence appears as a natural soft glow on real surfaces, not a painted-on graphic. No on-image text or brand names.

images.context: Course hero image for 'Introduction to Ultraviolet Light and Fluorescence'
images.prompt: A professional Australian restoration technician wearing UV-protective eyewear and gloves, sweeping a handheld UV inspection torch across an interior wall in a darkened room during a water-loss inspection, revealing a soft natural fluorescent glow where moisture and residues sit. Controlled low light with a cool violet-blue cast, calm and technical, over-the-shoulder framing. Realistic professional photography.
images.negativePrompt: no on-image text, no logos, no brand names, no watermarks, no gore, no distressing imagery, no identifiable face-forward portraits, no spooky or horror mood, no crime-scene styling, no painted-on graphic glow, no neon signage

images.context: Module 4 — Water Loss Inspection Uses: tracing leak sources with UV-responsive dye tracer
images.prompt: Close mid-distance shot of a gloved technician in UV-protective eyewear directing a UV torch at plumbing under a sink, where a UV-responsive dye tracer glows softly along a pipe join to reveal a leak path. Darkened cabinet interior with a cool violet-blue light, clear diagnostic focus. Realistic professional photography.

images.context: Module 3 — Equipment Application: capturing fluorescing indications with UV imaging support
images.prompt: A restoration technician in UV-protective eyewear and gloves photographing a softly fluorescing wall area with a camera on a small tripod during a darkened UV inspection in an Australian home, a handheld UV lamp illuminating the surface. Controlled low light, cool violet-blue tone, methodical documentation, hands-on-task framing. Realistic professional photography.
